title: Steamed Bamboo and Bean Delight
description: A simple and nutritious dish made with steamed bamboo, beans, and a hint of nutty flavor.
instructions: Rinse the bamboo shoots and cut them into bite-sized pieces.
Heat the nutty oil in a large skillet or wok over medium heat.
Add the bamboo shoots and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the cooked soya beans, shattering rice, and bean sauce (if using) to the skillet.
Stir-fry everything together for 2-3 minutes, or until the ingredients are well combined.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the dish hot, garnished with additional steamed water if desired.
Repeat for the desired number of servings.
